---
title: "About this blog"
description: |
  A place for me to learn more about the NFL and its salary cap
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```
If you've somehow stumbled across this blog, welcome!

I've been a football fan as long as I can remember.
![](images/me.png){fig-alt="A picture of me in my youth wearing a toy Cowboys helmet and Bengals pajamas" width="250px"}

Thanks to the excellent public tools now available (nflreadr, OverTheCap, NextGenStats just to name a few) analysis of the sport is more accessible than ever.

The aim of this blog is to further my understanding of the game and improve my skills in storytelling with data.

[Connect with me on Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/topfiftyone.com)
